# 1ROLLO

> 1ROLLO is the world's first commercial autonomous one-wheeled security robot — making security services 10x cheaper, smarter, and more energy-efficient.

1ROLLO (Rollo Robotics) builds autonomous patrol robots for industrial sites, logistics hubs, and large outdoor properties. The site presents the product, company, careers, blog, and EU co-funding information.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the 1ROLLO autonomous security robot.
- [Product](/product): Technical specifications, capabilities, and the patented one-wheeled platform.
- [About](/about): Company, mission, and team behind Rollo Robotics.
- [Careers](/career): Open roles at Rollo Robotics.
- [Contact](/contact): Request a quote, demo, or partnership.
- [Blog](/blog): News, product updates, and field reports.
- [EU Funding](/funding): NextGenerationEU co-financing details (English).
- [EU kaasrahastus](/eu-kaasrahastus): NextGenerationEU co-financing details (Estonian).
